  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CooldownsConfig
    Cooldown periods to prevent over-trading after buy or sell events.
    DataConfig
    Data source configuration: which price field and timeframe the strategy operates on.
    ExecutionConfig
    Execution parameters: order type, slippage and fees models.
    OutputsConfig
    Configuration for strategy outputs: which events to emit and which metrics to track.
    RiskControlsConfig
    Risk management parameters: position exposure limits, drawdown limits, and breach actions.
    SizingConfig
    Reusable position sizing block.
    StrategyConfig
    Root configuration for complex trading strategies.
    StrategyConfigValidator
    Utility for parsing and validating a StrategyConfig from JSON.
    UniverseConfig
    Defines the asset universe and allowed trade direction for the strategy.
